title: Xtra Roasted Algerian Chicken Tagine
description: A romantic Algerian dish featuring roasted chicken, coconut flakes, and coconut cream, with anti-inflammatory friendly ingredients. This dish is perfect for a special occasion or a cozy night in.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 425 degrees Fahrenheit.
Rinse the chicken thighs and pat them dry with paper towels.
In a large bowl, mix together the coconut flakes, ginger, turmeric, cumin, cayenne pepper, salt, and black pepper.
Add the chicken thighs to the bowl and toss to coat evenly with the spice mixture.
Heat the olive oil in a large oven-safe skillet over medium-high heat.
Add the chicken thighs to the skillet and sear for 5 minutes on each side.
Transfer the skillet to the preheated oven and roast for 30 minutes.
Remove the skillet from the oven and stir in the coconut cream.
Return the skillet to the oven and roast for an additional 10 minutes.
Remove the skillet from the oven and let the chicken rest for 10 minutes before serving.
Cook poultry to an internal temperature of 74°C / 165°F before serving.
